data.statement_mn:
Дараах томьёогоор өгөгдсөн дарааллын n-р гишүүнийг ол.

- \(a_0 = a_1 = 1\)
- \(a_{2n} = a_n + a_{n-1}\)
- \(a_{2n+1} = a_n - a_{n-1}\)

Натурал тоо \(n\) (\(1 \le n \le 1000\)) өгөгдөнө. Дарааллын n-р гишүүнийг хэвлэ.
data.statement_en:
Find the n-th term of the sequence defined by:

- \(a_0 = a_1 = 1\)
- \(a_{2n} = a_n + a_{n-1}\)
- \(a_{2n+1} = a_n - a_{n-1}\)

You are given a natural number \(n\) (\(1 \le n \le 1000\)). Print the n-th term of the sequence.
data.input_format_en: A single line containing a natural number \(n\).
data.output_format_en: Print the n-th term of the sequence.
